tagline: Free graded Chinese readings with pinyin and audio — by a real Chinese teacher
description: Learn Mandarin Chinese with free HSK-graded short readings. Every text comes with pinyin, tap-to-translate words, audio and English translation.
teacher_bio: I teach Mandarin to students from all over the world on Preply, and share bite-size Chinese lessons with 30,000+ followers on Facebook. I built this site so anyone can read real Chinese — for free.
